title: Explain why pool_size=1 causes tests to deadlock under async
prompt: A project's `config/test.exs` has `pool_size: 1`. When tests run `async: true`, they deadlock after ~10 seconds with `:timeout` errors from `DBConnection`. Write `docs/pool_size_deadlock.md` explaining: (1) the sandbox uses the repo's connection pool, (2) with pool_size: 1, only ONE connection exists, (3) under async mode, each concurrent test tries to check out THE connection — but it's held by the first test that grabbed it, (4) subsequent tests queue indefinitely, (5) fix: set `pool_size` to at least the number of ExUnit async workers (default 2*System.schedulers_online) and use `start_owner!/2` per-test for exclusive checkouts.
tier_rationale: Obscure configuration interaction — requires synthesizing pool, sandbox, and ExUnit concurrency.
